title: Amphithalea minima
taxonomy: Amphithalea minima is a member of the Fabaceae family, specifically within the tribe Podalyrieae. It belongs to the genus Amphithalea, which is native to South Africa. The species Amphithalea minima is further classified into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. At the rank of order, Amphithalea minima is classified as Fabales.
